title: Fortescue
overview: Exploring womanhood, insanity, and friendship, our story unfolds with two close friends enjoying a whimsical, platonic bond at a quaint summer cottage. Amid sun-soaked days of leisure, their carefree world is disrupted when a boyfriend joins, leading to a performance of an age-old tale. Soon after, one friend descends into a haunting trance, exposing the pain of conforming to outdated female ideals.
